Tests if the Number object has the property "POSITIVE_INFINITY".

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion script that checks if the `Number` object in JavaScript has a property named `POSITIVE_INFINITY`. The `assert` function is used to verify this condition, which is a standard way to ensure that the JavaScript environment correctly implements this property. The presence of `POSITIVE_INFINITY` is expected as part of the ECMAScript specification, and this script helps confirm compliance with that standard. This code provides narrow functionality focused on a single property check within the JavaScript `Number` object.
